commentaries.author: Erasmus of Rotterdam
commentaries.content: Moreover, the candor of those who brought the profit from the sale of their possessions was matched by the honesty of those who distributed it. Trustworthiness in money-managers is rare. Here distribution was made without respect of persons according to the need of each.

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content:
placing it before the feet of the Apostles:
This was a symbolic act designed to show that men must trample on covetousness.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
